value.note: HRRc = heart rate recovery (largest 60s HR drop in bpm after exceeding threshold HR for >1 min). Higher = better parasympathetic recovery. Null when threshold not reached, recording stopped before cooldown, or no HR data. Trend: 7d mean vs 28d mean, >10% = meaningful (min 1 session/7d, 3 sessions/28d). Display only — not wired into readiness_decision signals.
